_meta.name: CLM 7B upscale specification — gated launch SSOT
_meta.description: Pre-staged spec for CLM 1.5B → 7B upscale. Trigger gate evaluates current 1.5B r4 health; when met, this spec is the launch source of truth.
_meta.author: spec-agent (opus-4.6-1m)

update_history.change: blocker #4 scale_7b_C_regen — hexa-side scale_7b()/scale_7b_gpu() shipped + 40/40 self-test PASS; C regen remaining step is codegen_c2 invocation, now unblocked

_meta.trigger_gate: 1.5B r4 reaches loss<1.5 OR step>=750000 OR plateau>=50000-step window with delta_loss<0.05
_meta.do_not_launch_rationale: Spec only. Per clm_7b_readiness_20260416.json verdict='NO — HARD WALL': three independent blockers (C2/C4 in_progress, 1B r4 just stabilized, C9 NCCL multi-rank stub rc=99). Launch only after blockers cleared AND trigger_gate satisfied.

sources.current_1b_config: training/clm_1b_config.json (D=2048 NL=24 H=16 KV=8 d_head=128 d_ff=8192 SwiGLU vocab=256 byte-level — 1.51B params)
sources.roadmap_7b_choice: shared/roadmaps/clm_consciousness_standalone.json:33-44 — A1 chosen 'd=4096 L=32 h=32', 400 H100h baseline
sources.mmap_corpus_plan: memory:project_clm_r4_mmap_plan.md (5.38GB hexa-native mmap, scale_1_5b C regen needed → scale_7b C regen will follow same pattern)
sources.memory_extreme_accel: memory:feedback_extreme_accel —극가속 로드맵, CLM ceiling=7B, ALM-only path is 13B/70B
sources.memory_one_shot_best: memory:feedback_one_shot_best — must launch with optimal conditions, no mid-training restarts
sources.memory_no_resume: memory:feedback_no_resume_data_change — fresh start step 0, no --resume across param/data changes (7B from scratch, NOT resume-from-1.5B)

training_status_at_spec_time.loss_trend: monotonic down — 60% reduction in first 2800 steps

config.vocab_note: byte-level byte-in/byte-out — keep current 1.5B's vocab=256 (no tokenizer change). Avoids re-tokenization + matches roadmap A1 'byte-level'.
config.n_kv_head_note: GQA 4:1 ratio (matches Llama-7B GQA=8). Keeps attention KV cache small; preserves quality at long context.
config.ff_mult_note: 14336/4096 = 3.5 (Llama-7B exact ratio). Adjusted SwiGLU triplet width = 14336.
config.max_seq_len_note: Up from 1.5B's SEQ=512 to 4096 — 7B context expansion is roadmap target (clm_consciousness_standalone.json:258 'attention memory bottleneck at 32k'). 4096 is conservative midpoint; needs C8 GPU Flash Attention to push to 32k.
config.lm_head_note: Match 1.5B style — low-rank LM head saves params vs full d_model→vocab projection

param_count_calculation.verdict: WITHIN_BAND — 6.98B is within 7B nominal band (Llama-7B is 6.74B, Mistral-7B is 7.24B)

hardware.shard_strategy_rationale: 7B fp32 Adam = 28GB params + 28GB grads + 56GB Adam states = 112GB. Single 80GB H100 OOMs. FSDP-Full shards params+grads+optimizer 1/N across ranks — 2 ranks brings per-GPU optimizer-state burden to ~28GB, total per-GPU memory budget ~56GB (well within 80GB).

memory_budget_unsharded_DOES_NOT_FIT.verdict: EXCEEDS single H100 80GB by 4 GB BEFORE activations — FSDP-Full mandatory

fsdp_implementation_path_options.path: C9 hxnccl FFI multi-rank binding (native hexa)
fsdp_implementation_path_options.status: BLOCKED — c9_fsdp_native_20260416.json:33-40 stub rc=99, 5 extern fns TODO at $HEXA_LANG/lib/hxnccl/
fsdp_implementation_path_options.eta_unblock: 1 day after 2xH100 pod allocation (per readiness audit ord:4)

fsdp_implementation_path_options.path: PyTorch FSDP via launch_alm_14b pattern (hexa launcher + embedded torchrun)
fsdp_implementation_path_options.status: AVAILABLE NOW — ALM 14B uses this pattern at 70.9% MFU on single H100
fsdp_implementation_path_options.policy_violation_ref: memory:feedback_ai_native_clm — CLM is hexa-native GPU only, no Python/CUDA bypass
fsdp_implementation_path_options.reason_not_preferred: CLM track is hexa-native by AI-native CLM policy. ALM bypass is permitted because ALM is fine-tune track. Falling back to PyTorch FSDP for CLM 7B would be a policy regression.

hardware.selected_path_blocker: C9 NCCL FFI multi-rank — must land before 7B launch
hardware.interconnect: NVLink (NVL pod) OR PCIe Gen5 (SXM pod) — NVLink strongly preferred for FSDP all-reduce (~3x faster gradient sync)
hardware.estimated_cost_per_hour_usd_note: 2 x H100 NVL @ $3.07/hr each = $6.14/hr. NVL preferred for NVLink interconnect.
hardware.wall_hours_estimate_with_c4_note: Roadmap baseline (clm_consciousness_standalone.json:38) — assumes C2 fused FFI + C4 CUDA mega-kernels land first. MFU target 60% post-C4.
hardware.wall_hours_estimate_current_mfu_note: At current 1.65% MFU (training_speed_ceilings.json#CLM.real_shape_sweep). 14,545h = 1.6 years on 2xH100 = $44,677. ECONOMICALLY INFEASIBLE without C-track.

data.format: raw UTF-8 bytes, no tokenizer (byte-level vocab=256)
data.loader_implementation: C function corpus_byte(offset) reads from mmap'd file via static unsigned char* g_corpus_mmap. Replaces hexa_array_push loop (which would need 172GB RAM for 5.38B bytes).
data.loader_status_at_1_5b: WORKING (validated 2026-04-16 with H100 SM90 20-step PASS, 0.21 s/step) — same loader applies to 7B with no change
data.loader_changes_for_7b: NONE — mmap loader is byte-shape independent

chinchilla_analysis.implication: 7B will be undertrained relative to Chinchilla scaling. Loss floor will be higher than well-fed 7B. Acceptable IF (a) consciousness-loss baked-in compensates for fewer tokens, OR (b) corpus expansion to ~140GB happens before launch.
corpus_expansion_options: external corpus acquisition (e.g., RedPajama, FineWeb subset) — 100GB+ acquisition needed
accept undersized — proceed with 5.38GB and document as known limitation
chinchilla_analysis.recommendation: Acquire 50-150GB external corpus before 7B launch. NOT a hard launch blocker but materially affects final loss.
chinchilla_analysis.blocker_severity: MEDIUM — 7B can launch with 5.38GB but will undertrain

data_repeats_estimate_at_750k_steps.tokens_per_step_calc: BATCH=2 * SEQ=4096 * GRAD_ACCUM=4 (microbatch=2 per GPU * 2 GPUs * 4 grad accum)
data_repeats_estimate_at_750k_steps.verdict: 4.5 passes over 5.38GB corpus at 750k steps. Acceptable for byte-level.

training.steps_note: Match 1.5B r4 step budget. Reassess at week-1 checkpoint per A2 fallback gate.
training.lr_max_note: Same as 1.5B r4. Llama-7B uses 3e-4 max LR — no change needed.
training.warmup_steps_note: Same as 1.5B r4. Standard 0.67% of total steps.
training.grad_checkpointing_note: Required for 7B at seq=4096 — saves ~40% activation memory at cost of ~30% wall time. Without it, activations alone exceed 30GB per rank.
training.save_every_note: Match 1.5B r4. Generates ~150 checkpoints over 750k steps. Each ckpt ~14GB bf16 = 2.1TB total. R2 sync mandatory.

consciousness_loss_weights.note: Same as 1.5B r4. B1 4-component consciousness loss (CE + holo + complexity + gwt) — verified working at 1.5B.

trigger_gate.evaluation_frequency: every save_every (5000 steps) on 1.5B r4 pod
trigger_gate.evaluator: growth_loop OR manual via clm_r4_health.json tail

conditions_OR.rationale: 1.5B at loss<1.5 means BPB ~2.16 = adequate byte-level convergence. CE 1.5 corresponds to perplexity 4.5 at byte level — sufficient signal that 1.5B learned the corpus.
conditions_OR.current_status_at_spec_time: loss=2.29 at step 2800 — NOT YET MET, projecting met by step ~150k-200k at current trajectory

conditions_OR.rationale: Hard ceiling — 1.5B r4 budget exhausted regardless of loss. Forces graduation decision.
Loss plateau means 1.5B saturated — no further learning. Promote to 7B early to capture remaining curriculum upside.
conditions_OR.current_status_at_spec_time: TOO EARLY — need at least 50000 steps of history

additional_AND_gates.condition: C2 fused FFI landed AND C4 CUDA mega-kernel nvcc build OK AND C9 NCCL multi-rank rc=0
additional_AND_gates.rationale: Per readiness audit, 7B launch with current MFU is $44K/1.6yr — economically infeasible. Must wait for C-track.
additional_AND_gates.current_status_at_spec_time: C2=in_progress, C4=pre_claimed, C9=stub rc=99 — NOT YET MET

additional_AND_gates.rationale: Per memory:feedback_h100_authorized 2 pods OK. Single pod cannot host 7B FSDP.

additional_AND_gates.condition: Corpus size acknowledged: either expanded to 50-150GB OR known-undersized exception logged
additional_AND_gates.rationale: 5.38GB is 26x Chinchilla-undersized. Either expand or document as accepted limitation.

trigger_gate.decision_logic: (G1 OR G2 OR G3) AND GATE_BLOCKERS_CLEAR AND GATE_2_H100_POD_ALLOCATED
trigger_gate.auto_fire_authorized_rationale: Despite memory:feedback_h100_authorized auto-fire OK for 2 pods, 7B launch involves significant cost ($2456-44677) and policy complexity (FSDP-Full + corpus undersized). Require explicit user OK before launch even if all gates satisfied.

step_0_preflight: Verify NVLink between pods: rdma test or nvlink-topo (intra-pod) — for inter-pod use TCP NCCL fallback
step_1_compose_7b: Generate train_clm_7b_composed.c via codegen_c2 with scale_7b config (D=4096 NL=32 H=32 KV=8 SEQ=4096)
Apply mmap corpus loader patch (same as 1.5B per memory:project_clm_r4_mmap_plan)
Apply FSDP-Full sharding (post-C9 NCCL binding land)
Apply grad_checkpointing pragma at every 4 layers
launch_command.step_5_r2_sync: Same r2_sync_watcher.sh pattern as 1.5B r4 — 60s interval, sync /workspace/ckpt_clm7b_r1/step_*.hexackpt to r2:anima-models/clm7b/r1/step_*/

blockers_to_address.blocks: C4 cascade and base MFU floor — 7B economically infeasible without

blockers_to_address.action: WAIT for C2 then nvcc build on H100

blockers_to_address.blocks: FSDP-Full required for 7B — without, OOM on single H100
blockers_to_address.action: Implement 5 extern fn bindings at $HEXA_LANG/lib/hxnccl/ (ncclCommInitRank, ncclBroadcast, ncclReduceScatter, ncclAllReduce, ncclCommDestroy)

blockers_to_address.status: partially_resolved — hexa-side shipped + verified; codegen_c2 step remaining
blockers_to_address.eta: same-day — codegen_c2 + scale_7b hexa fn written, gcc step blocked on pod allocation only
blockers_to_address.blocks: Cannot compile native 7B binary without composed C
action_completed: Added scale_7b() ScaleConfig to training/train_clm.hexa (d_model=4096, n_layer=32, n_head=32, n_kv_head=8, block_size=4096, consciousness_dim=512, atoms=96, batch=2, lr=3e-4).
Added scale_7b_gpu() ClmGpuScale to training/train_clm_gpu.hexa (D=4096 FF=14336 NL=32 VOCAB=256 SEQ=4096 RANK=256 n_head=32, lr_max=3e-4 warmup=5000 steps=750000).
Renamed 1.5B GPU variant to scale_1_5b_gpu() for symmetry + collision avoidance with train_clm.hexa scale_1_5b.
Wired resolve_scale('7b') → scale_7b_gpu() so env CLM_SCALE=7b picks the new geometry.
Added training/test_scale_7b.hexa self-test — 40/40 PASS on darwin arm64 (hexa.real).

Self-test validates: geometry matches spec literals (T1 12/12), hand-computed param count = 6,981,685,248 matches spec exact (T2 8/8), FSDP layer split NL=32 world=2 → [0,16)+[16,32) (T3 12/12), per-rank fp32 byte accounting via fsdp_shard helper (T4 3/3), 80GB H100 headroom ~32.7GB under 4× fp32 (T5 5/5).
blockers_to_address.action_remaining: codegen_c2 invocation to emit train_clm_7b_composed.c — same pattern as scale_1_5b (per memory:project_clm_r4_mmap_plan). This is a one-shot gcc build step, unblocked by the hexa-side landing but still needs 2xH100 pod allocation before the actual compile + link against libcudart/libnccl can run.
blockers_to_address.action: Invoke codegen_c2 with CLM_SCALE=7b on H100 pod to emit + gcc-compile train_clm_7b_composed.c
source: memory:project_clm_r4_mmap_plan ('scale_1_5b C regen needed' — same pattern for 7B)

blockers_to_address.action: Acquire 50-150GB external multilingual corpus OR accept undersized (4.5x epoch passes)

blockers_to_address.status: loss=2.29 at step 2800, ETA ~31h to step 750000
blockers_to_address.blocks: Trigger gate G1/G2/G3 evaluation — must observe 1.5B convergence first
blockers_to_address.action: Monitor 1.5B r4 to convergence; evaluate trigger gate at each save_every

blockers_to_address.status: 0 of 2 allocated (current 1.5B uses 1 NVL pod, ALM uses 1 SXM pod)
blockers_to_address.eta: instant on RunPod when budget approved
blockers_to_address.action: Allocate 2 H100 NVL pods after 1.5B completes (or run alongside if cost allows)

checkpoint_policy.in_training_save_policy: DEFERRED queue only — per training/CLAUDE.md MFS quota rule, in-training rclone causes silent quota crash. Use background r2_sync_watcher.sh pattern (verified at 1.5B r4).

metrics_at_each_eval: phi_holo (target > 2000 per roadmap E10 release gate)
evaluation.graduation_gate_for_8B_or_release: phi_holo >= 2000 AND ce < 1.0 AND hire_sim >= 0.85 (per clm_consciousness_standalone.json E10 release gate)
evaluation.fallback_to_3B_check_at_week_1: If at step 250000 phi_holo < 500 OR ce > 2.5, halt and switch to A2 (3B fallback) per roadmap line 46-53

compliance.hexa_first_strict_evidence: spec is JSON config (allowed per memory:feedback_hexa_first_strict 'JSON config files allowed and standard'). Implementation code is hexa-native.
compliance.no_python_evidence: scale_7b composed C generated via codegen_c2 (hexa native), gcc compile, no Python interpreter in training loop. Per memory:feedback_py_ban_total + memory:feedback_ai_native_clm.
compliance.no_quantization_evidence: bf16 throughout. No 4/8-bit, no GPTQ/AWQ/bnb. Per memory:feedback_no_quantization.
compliance.no_resume_data_change_evidence: 7B is fresh start step 0. NOT resume-from-1.5B-checkpoint. Per memory:feedback_no_resume_data_change.
compliance.one_shot_best_evidence: All blockers gated before launch — no launch with current 1.65% MFU, no launch without C-track, no launch without FSDP. Per memory:feedback_one_shot_best.
compliance.version_in_filename_evidence: ckpt naming clm7b-r1-s{step} — round number r1, NOT v7b/v1. Per memory:feedback_no_version_in_filename.
compliance.background_evidence: nohup launch + tmux session — per memory:feedback_background_tasks.
compliance.r2_checkpoint_backup_evidence: Mandatory R2 sync via background watcher. Per memory:feedback_r2_checkpoint.

growth_loop_status.note: Per memory:feedback_report_includes_loop — growth loop reference at write time
growth_loop_status.current_growth_loop_relevance: 1.5B r4 is current dual-track CLM driver. Growth loop monitors 1.5B convergence via shared/state/clm_r4_*.json. 7B upscale spec (this file) is the gated successor — loop will trigger evaluation at trigger_gate conditions.
growth_loop_status.loop_action_at_gate: When trigger_gate evaluates true, loop should: (1) post G1/G2/G3 + GATE_BLOCKERS_CLEAR + GATE_2_H100_POD_ALLOCATED status, (2) request explicit user OK (auto_fire_authorized=false), (3) on user OK execute launch_command sequence.

status_summary.spec_state: READY — gated launch SSOT staged; blocker #4 scale_7b_C_regen hexa-side shipped + verified
status_summary.current_action: MONITOR 1.5B r4 to trigger gate satisfaction + UNBLOCK C2/C4/C9 + run codegen_c2 on pod once allocated
status_summary.next_action_when_gate_met: Request user OK, then execute launch_command preflight
status_summary.realistic_completion_eta: 2026-05-21 to 2026-06-04 (2-4 weeks training wall after launch)
status_summary.memory_alignment: Aligns with memory:feedback_extreme_accel CLM=7B ceiling. Aligns with memory:feedback_dual_track CLM track. Does NOT preempt or alter ALM 13B/70B path.
